intro: Through the patient portal you can safely and easily arrange matters with your GP practice online: book appointments, request repeat prescriptions, send e-consultations, view results and access your medical record.

belangrijk.text: Please note: Choose the correct practice/GP. Otherwise we cannot process your request.
The patient portal is available for patients aged 16 and older.
Child under 16? Send a secure message via ZIVVER. Do not log in to your own portal for your child.
